import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem play_CooperateBot' (n : Nat) (opponent : Prog) :
    play (n+1) CooperateBot opponent = some .C := by
  unfold play eval CooperateBot
  simp only

theorem outcome_CooperateBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+1) CooperateBot CooperateBot = some (.C, .C) := by
  unfold outcome
  rw [play_CooperateBot']
  rfl

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.DefectBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem play_CooperateBot' (n : Nat) (opponent : Prog) :
    play (n+1) CooperateBot opponent = some .C := by
  unfold play eval CooperateBot
  simp only

theorem outcome_CooperateBot_vs_DefectBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+1) CooperateBot DefectBot = some (.C, .D) := by
  unfold outcome
  rw [play_CooperateBot', play_DefectBot]
  rfl

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem play_DefectBot (n : Nat) (opponent : Prog) :
      play (n+1) DefectBot opponent = some .D := by
    unfold play eval DefectBot
    simp

theorem outcome_DefectBot_vs_DefectBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+1) DefectBot DefectBot = some (.D, .D) := by
  unfold outcome
  rw [play_DefectBot]
  rfl

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.MirrorBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

/-- MirrorBot mirrors its opponent: it simulates the opponent against itself.
    Against CooperateBot, it simulates CooperateBot against MirrorBot,
    which immediately returns .C (CooperateBot is .const .C). Minimum fuel needed is 2. -/
theorem outcome_MirrorBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+2) MirrorBot CooperateBot = some (.C, .C) := by
  have hA : play (n+2) MirrorBot CooperateBot = some .C := by
    show eval (n+2) MirrorBot CooperateBot MirrorBot = some .C
    unfold MirrorBot CooperateBot
    simp only [eval, Prog.subst]
  have hB : play (n+2) CooperateBot MirrorBot = some .C := rfl
  simp [outcome, hA, hB]

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.MirrorBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.Helpers
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.DefectBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

-- Confirm that play 1 MirrorBot DefectBot = none (n+1 is insufficient)
theorem mirror_play_1_is_none : play 1 MirrorBot DefectBot = none := by
  unfold play MirrorBot DefectBot
  simp [eval]

-- The main theorem with n+2 (minimum needed fuel is 2)
theorem outcome_MirrorBot_vs_DefectBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+2) MirrorBot DefectBot = some (.D, .D) := by
  have hA : play (n+2) MirrorBot DefectBot = some .D := by
    apply play_from_eval
    unfold MirrorBot DefectBot
    simp [eval, Prog.subst]
  have hB : play (n+2) DefectBot MirrorBot = some .D :=
    play_DefectBot (n+1) MirrorBot
  simp [outcome, hA, hB]

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.DBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.Helpers

open PDNew.Bots
open PDNew
namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_DBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+3) DBot CooperateBot = some (.D, .C) := by
  have hA : play (n+3) DBot CooperateBot = some .D := DBot_plays_D_against_CooperateBot n
  have hB : play (n+3) CooperateBot DBot = some .C := rfl
  simp [outcome, hA, hB]

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.TitForTatBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.TitForTatBot

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_TitForTatBot_vs_CooperateBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+3) TitForTatBot CooperateBot = some (.C, .C) := by
  exact TitForTatBot_vs_CB n

end PDNew.Theorems

import PrisonersDilemma.Program
import PrisonersDilemma.Dynamics
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.TitForTatBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.DefectBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Bots.CooperateBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.DefectBot
import PrisonersDilemma.Theorems.Helpers

open PDNew
open PDNew.Bots

namespace PDNew.Theorems

theorem outcome_TitForTatBot_vs_DefectBot (n : Nat) :
    outcome (n+3) TitForTatBot DefectBot = some (.D, .D) := by
  have hA : play (n+3) TitForTatBot DefectBot = some .D := by
    apply play_from_eval
    unfold TitForTatBot DefectBot CooperateBot
    simp [eval, Prog.subst]
    decide
  have hB : play (n+3) DefectBot TitForTatBot = some .D :=
    play_DefectBot n TitForTatBot
  simp [outcome, hA, hB]

end PDNew.Theorems
